privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.introduction: Welcome to Planutrip. We are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring you have a positive experience on our website and mobile applications.

information.title: Information We Collect
information.description: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, update your profile, or contact us.

usage.title: How We Use Your Information
usage.description: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, and to communicate with you.

security.title: Security
security.description: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures designed to protect personal information against accidental or unlawful destruction, loss, alteration, unauthorized disclosure, or access.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.description: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information at any time.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at contact@planutrip.com.

privacyPolicy.acceptanceRequired: By using Planutrip, you agree to the terms of this Privacy Policy.

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: By accessing and using Planutrip, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement. If you do not agree to abide by the above, please do not use this service.

section2.title: 2. Age Eligibility
section2.content: This service is intended for users 18 years of age or older. By using Planutrip, you represent and warrant that you are at least 18 years old. If you are under 18 years old, you are not permitted to use this service. We do not knowingly collect personal information from individuals under 18 years of age. If we become aware that we have collected information from someone under 18, we will take appropriate steps to delete such information and terminate the user's account.

section3.title: 3. Use License
section3.content: Permission is granted to temporarily download one copy of the materials (information or software) on Planutrip for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only. This is the grant of a license, not a transfer of title, and under this license you may not:
restrictions: Using the materials for any commercial purpose or for any public display
Attempting to decompile or reverse engineer any software contained on Planutrip
Removing any copyright or other proprietary notations from the materials
Transferring the materials to another person or "mirroring" the materials on any other server

section4.title: 4. Collaboration & Sharing
section4.content: Planutrip allows you to create travel plans and share them with other users. When you share a plan:
points: Collaborators you invite gain the ability to view, edit, and delete items within the shared plan
Only the plan owner can delete the entire travel plan and revoke access to collaborators
You are responsible for inviting only authorized users and maintaining plan privacy
Sharing is done via email invitation; you must provide valid email addresses

section5.title: 5. User Conduct
section5.content: You agree not to use Planutrip to:
prohibited: Harass, threaten, or abuse other users
Share or post illegal, violent, or harmful content
Spam or manipulate the sharing and invitation features
Attempt to gain unauthorized access to accounts or systems
Share abusive, defamatory, or obscene content in travel plans

section6.title: 6. Account Responsibility
section6.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account login credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to notify Planutrip immediately of any unauthorized use of your account. Planutrip is not responsible for losses caused by unauthorized access to your account due to your failure to protect your credentials.

section7.title: 7. Data Ownership & Deletion
section7.content: You retain full ownership of your travel plans and the data you create. When you delete your account:
dataPoints: All your travel plans and itineraries are deleted from our systems
We retain anonymized usage logs for up to 30 days for security purposes
Collaborators will lose access to your shared plans

section8.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
section8.content: Planutrip is provided on an "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" basis without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. Planutrip disclaims all warranties, express or implied, including but not limited to implied warranties of merchantability and fitness for a particular purpose. Planutrip will not be liable for:
liabilities: Travel mishaps, accidents, or incidents related to plans created on the platform
Disputes between you and other users or collaborators
Damages arising from unauthorized access to your account

section9.title: 9. Modifications to Service
section9.content: Planutrip reserves the right to modify or discontinue, temporarily or permanently, the service (or any part thereof) with or without notice. You agree that Planutrip shall not be liable to you or to any third party for any modification, suspension, or discontinuance of the service.

section10.title: 10. Governing Law
section10.content: These terms and conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction in which Planutrip operates, and you irrevocably submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in that location.

section11.title: 11. GDPR & LGPD Compliance
section11.intro: Planutrip is committed to compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) in the European Union and the Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados (LGPD) in Brazil.
section11.acceptanceLine: When you accept these Terms of Service during signup:
compliancePoints: You consent to our collection and processing of personal data as described in our Privacy Policy
Your consent timestamp and the Privacy Policy version are recorded for transparency and compliance audits
Audit logs recording your data processing activities are retained for 180 days for compliance purposes, then automatically deleted
You have the right to withdraw consent at any time by deleting your account
You retain all rights under GDPR and LGPD, including data access, correction, deletion, and portability
In the event of a data breach, we will notify affected users via email within 72 hours as required by GDPR Article 33 and LGPD Article 33
section11.privacyNote: For more details on your rights and how we protect your data, please review our Privacy Policy.

section12.title: 12. Contact Us
section12.content: If you have questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at support@planutrip.app
